docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,278.00 FILED BY LIM, LARRY TAN AS TO DEFENDANT SHMUELY, NATALIE RAE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-28-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF NOV-06-2013 - JUDGMENT ENTERED. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952. JUDGE PRO TEM JASON JUNGREIS, CLERK WESLEY RAMIREZ, NOTHING REPORTED. DEPT 525

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-28-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-28-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID YANG. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID YANG. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIM, LARRY TAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHMUELY, NATALIE RAE $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-06-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 11:17AM

JUDGE PRO TEM JASON JUNGREIS, CLERK WESLEY RAMIREZ, NOTHING ON RECORD, DEPT 525.
CAUSE CALLED FOR SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL. APPELLANT, NATALIE RAE SHMUELY APPEARS IN PRO PER WITH WITNESS, CYNTHIA SHMUELY. RESPONDENT, LARRY TAN LIM APPEARS IN PRO PER WITH WITNESS STEPHEN PRASOMPETCH. JUDGE PRO TEM JASON JUNGREIS NOTIFIES BOTH PARTIES THAT HE HAD A PREVIOUS BUSINESS RELATIONSHIP WITH RESPONDENT, LARRY TAN LIM AND INFORMED ALL SIDES THAT THEY HAVE THE RIGHT TO HAVE HIM RECUSED FROM CASE IF SO CHOOSE. PARTIES AGREE TO HAVE HIM HEAR CASE. PARTIES, PREVIOUSLY SWORN, TESTIFY IN THE NARRATIVE AND RESPOND TO QUESTIONS FROM JUDGE JUNGREIS.

EXHR (A) PICTURES AND POLICE REPORT

EXHA (1) DOCTOR LETTERS AND REPORT
EXHA (2) OPENING STATEMENT

12:00PM
NEWLY EVIDENCE IS RETAINED, MATTER IS SUBMITTED

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-28-2013 Judgment Entered
